nasb.text: But the court will sit for judgment, and his dominion will be taken away, annihilated and destroyed forever.

esv.text: But the court shall sit in judgment, and his dominion shall be taken away, to be consumed and destroyed to the end.

cnv.text: 但審判要開始，他的權柄必被奪去，他必被毀壞滅絕，直到永遠。

ccb.text: 然而，审判者将坐下来审判，夺去并永远废除他的权柄。
